consistency.notes: This feature matches the standard Ability Score Improvement (ASI) progression for classes that receive it at these specific levels (4, 8, 12, 16, 19). It is entirely consistent with established D&D 5e rules.

quality.notes: The description is clear, concise, and accurately reflects the rules text, including the standard cap of 20 for ability scores.

mechanics.notes: Mechanically standard. Provides essential character growth opportunities.

analysis.overall_assessment: Excellent. The data is perfectly structured, complete, and accurately reflects the source material (PHB Barbarian feature).
